product_visual_description: Occhiali smart con montatura aviator oversize in metallo color gunmetal/acciaio scuro con dettagli dorati. Lenti sfumate dal bordo esterno scuro verso il centro più chiaro, con tonalità bronzo-rosa trasparente. Stanghette nere lucide con terminali in materiale plastico nero. Ponte nasale doppio in stile aviator classico. La montatura ha una forma arrotondata irregolare, quasi a cuore nella parte inferiore. Dimensioni percepite: large/oversize. Materiale struttura: acciaio inossidabile. Aspetto generale: elegante, futuristico, fashion-forward.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Occhiali Smart Bluetooth con IA.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- If LOGO_MODE == NO_LOGO: DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. DO NOT LEAVE EMPTY SPACE RESERVED FOR A LOGO — fill the full composition.
- If LOGO_MODE == LOGO_PROVIDED: follow the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES. The logo is the SECOND image_input (only for images 02, 04, 06, 09). For the other 6 images, behave exactly as NO_LOGO.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER", or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.prompt:

LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image — DO NOT ADD ANY LOGO, BRAND NAME, WATERMARK, OR PLACEHOLDER TEXT. Fill the full composition.
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER", or similar.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:
STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Isolate pixel-perfect the aviator oversize smart glasses: gunmetal/dark steel frame with gold accents, semi-transparent bronze-rose gradient lenses, black glossy temples. Double aviator nose bridge clearly visible. Extract ONLY the glasses as a perfect cutout — remove the model, remove any background.

STEP 2 — COMPOSE ON PURE WHITE BACKGROUND:
Place the glasses cutout centered slightly above-center on a pure white background RGB(255,255,255). The glasses should occupy approximately 70% of the canvas width. Angle: slight 3/4 perspective as in the reference (not perfectly flat). Cast a very soft, barely visible neutral shadow directly beneath the glasses at 8% opacity — no colored shadow, no bloom, no glow.
Zero text. Zero logos. Zero graphic elements. Zero decorations. Zero overlay. Zero effects on the product.
Pure white background everywhere: RGB(255,255,255).
This image must comply with Amazon main image requirements: white background, product only, nothing else.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO ENERGY BURST DORATO:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTOS:
Extract pixel-perfect the aviator oversize smart glasses: gunmetal-steel frame with gold accents, semi-transparent bronze-rose gradient lenses (darker at top fading to lighter below), black glossy temples, double aviator bridge. Place the glasses cutout centered on the canvas, occupying ~65% of canvas width, with a slight 3/4 tilt as in the reference. The glasses must appear photographic, not illustrated. THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Maintain a hard separation between the product layer and the background effect layer — if any background effect bleeds onto the product, that is a FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep dark brown-black gradient radial from center #1A1008 to corner #0A0805.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the glasses — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the glasses frame or lenses:
— Explosive golden light burst radiating from behind the center of the glasses: primary rays in #C8A050, secondary rays in #E8C070, tertiary micro-rays in #FFD97A.
— 12-16 sharp radial light beams of varying length (longest reaching near canvas edge), each 2-4px wide at root, tapering to a point. Opacity 70-90%.
— Scattered fine gold-bronze bokeh particles (#C8A050 at 40-60% opacity) in the mid-ground behind the glasses.
— Subtle warm lens-flare arc (thin, 1-2px, gold #C8A050 at 30% opacity) curving across the upper-left quadrant only — never touching the product.
— Background effect stays strictly BEHIND the glasses silhouette. Hard masked edge.
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty space reserved for anything.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:
Background: dark gradient #1A1008 to #2C1F0A (top-left to bottom-right), with a very faint geometric hexagonal pattern overlay at 4% opacity in #C8A050. The entire 2000x2000px canvas must be filled.

LEFT 55% of canvas: the glasses photographic cutout extracted from the reference, placed vertically centered, showing the full frame with slight 3/4 tilt. The glasses occupy ~48% of total canvas width. Below the glasses, a thin horizontal accent line in #C8A050 (2px, 40% width of the left column). Above the glasses, bold italic text: "STILE E TECNOLOGIA" in #C8A050, font-size approx 36px, tracking wide.

RIGHT 45% of canvas: vertical stack of 5 benefit lines, vertically centered in the column, with 28px spacing between lines. Each line: gold checkmark icon (#C8A050) + bold white text (approx 32px):
✓ "Traduttore IA in tempo reale"
✓ "Musica Bluetooth senza fili"
✓ "Risposta chiamate con tocco"
✓ "Idrorepellente, uso quotidiano"
✓ "Design aviator oversize unico"
Above the benefit list, section title in #C8A050 bold uppercase 28px: "I TUOI VANTAGGI"
Thin horizontal separator lines (#C8A050 at 20% opacity) between each benefit line.
Bottom of right column: thin accent line #C8A050 2px full column width.

BOTTOM STRIP (full width, 80px tall): dark background #0A0805, centered italic white text 24px: "Occhiali smart che combinano stile e intelligenza artificiale"

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Accent bar #C8A050 4px full width at very bottom.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:
Show a stylish Italian woman, 28-38 years old, elegant and confident, wearing the aviator oversize smart glasses extracted pixel-perfect from the reference photo. Lighting: warm golden-hour sun hitting her left side, soft fill light from right. Skin tones warm, natural. Hair: flowing, natural.

Mood: aspirational Italian fashion, sophisticated, not staged. Pure lifestyle photography — no studio feel.

NO text overlays anywhere on the image. NO graphic elements. NO logo space. NO borders. NO watermarks. Pure photographic lifestyle composition filling the entire 2000x2000px canvas.

— Title bold white 28px: "EVENTI SOCIALI"
— Subtext #C8A050 22px: "Stile e tecnologia insieme"

CENTER OVERLAP (on the grid cross-point): small glasses photographic cutout from reference (~280px wide), placed at the intersection of the 4 cards, slightly above-center with a very soft drop shadow. The glasses overlap the card borders — this is the compositional focus point.

BOTTOM STRIP full-width 80px: #0A0A14, centered bold gold text #C8A050 24px: "Bluetooth · Traduttore IA · Touch Control · Idrorepellente"

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photos of the GiDaCom Occhiali Smart Bluetooth con IA.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTOS.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — integrate logo as per LOGO INTEGRATION RULES (second image_input, bottom-right corner, only this image).
NEVER write the text "LOGO", "BRAND", "PLACEHOLDER", or similar.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG. Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:
Background: very dark #0A0A14 solid with a faint repeating diamond/rhombus pattern at 4% opacity in #C8A050. Full 2000x2000px canvas. Thin gold border frame #C8A050 3px, inset 20px from canvas edge — runs around the entire image.

TOP CENTER: bold white uppercase 48px tracking 8px: "ACQUISTO PROTETTO"
Below: thin gold line #C8A050 2px, 300px centered. Below line: white regular 24px: "Ogni ordine è coperto dalla nostra garanzia"

CENTER: 2x2 GRID of 4 trust badge cards (each ~860x420px, gap 24px, dark bg #141420, gold border #C8A050 1.5px, radius 16px, centered content):

CARD TOP-LEFT:
— Icon: shield with checkmark, gold #C8A050 64px
— Bold white 30px: "GARANZIA 24 MESI"
— Subtext #C8A050 22px: "Assistenza post-vendita inclusa"

CARD TOP-RIGHT:
— Icon: truck/rocket, gold #C8A050 64px
— Bold white 30px: "SPEDIZIONE RAPIDA"
— Subtext #C8A050 22px: "Consegna in 24-48 ore"

CARD BOTTOM-LEFT:
— Icon: certificate/star, gold #C8A050 64px
— Bold white 30px: "QUALITÀ CERTIFICATA"
— Subtext #C8A050 22px: "Testato e verificato"

CARD BOTTOM-RIGHT:
— Icon: headset/person, gold #C8A050 64px
— Bold white 30px: "SUPPORTO ITALIANO"
— Subtext #C8A050 22px: "Assistenza in lingua italiana"

BOTTOM SECTION (below grid, above canvas bottom): centered glasses photographic cutout from reference (~380px wide), centered horizontally. Below glasses: bold gold #C8A050 italic 24px: "Il tuo acquisto, protetto e garantito"

Bottom of canvas (inside the border frame): centered 5 gold star icons ★★★★★ #C8A050 36px + white text 20px: "5,0 — Recensioni Verificate"

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No reinterpretation of frame shape. No change to lens gradient color. No alteration of temple length or hinge position. No background bleeding through the lens area. No artificial bokeh applied on the product itself.
